sales.description:
Ancients
JUDAEA. Herodian Dynasty. Herod I the Great (40-4 BC). AE 4-prutot (23mm, 1h). NGC Choice Fine. Samarian, dated Regnal Year 3 (40/39 or 38/37 BC). Facing helmet with star atop crest; palms to either side / HPΩΔOY BAΣIΛEΩΣ, tripod with ceremonial bowl above; L Γ (date) to left, TP monogram to right. GBC 6, 6204.

In the Sixth Edition of the Guide to Biblical Coins, David Hendin takes a departure from his descriptions in Fifth Edition and notes on p. 202, "Herod's coins were struck in f...
